About Research Projects Skills Education Experience Awards
// 01 — About

Aastha Paudel

Dedicated AI & Machine Learning Researcher specialising in Natural Language Processing and Data Science. Focused on enhancing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines and Large Language Models to drive scholarly and industrial innovation — with a particular emphasis on low-resource languages such as Nepali.

Computer Engineering graduate from IOE, Tribhuvan University. Currently a Laravel Developer at Trilokya Technology while continuing active research. Microsoft Learn Student Ambassador and Vice Project Lead at Code For Change, Pokhara.

Research Interests

Large Language ModelsRetrieval-Augmented GenerationNatural Language ProcessingLow-Resource NLPData ScienceComparative AI EvaluationMultilingual AI Systems
◈Google Scholar⌥GitHub↗LinkedIn✉Email✍Blog
// 02 — Research

Research Contributions

IEEE ICTP 20262026Main Author & Presenter

Analyzing Conversational LLMs for Nepali Municipal Services: A Comparative Study of Retrieval-Augmented and Fine-Tuned Approaches

Presented at the IEEE International Conference on ICT and Photonics (ICTP 2026). Investigates the efficacy of Generative AI within low-resource linguistic frameworks, providing a foundational framework for deploying scalable AI solutions in the public sector. Conducts a rigorous comparative assessment between RAG and Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT), analysing response fidelity, contextual grounding, and computational feasibility for Nepali Municipal Service delivery.

Publication: Forthcoming
RAGLLMsNLPLow-Resource LanguagesNepaliSFTMunicipal AI
// 03 — Projects

Research Engineering & Applied AI

Industrial Experience

LMS & Education Tech

EduPath — Learning Management System

Scalable Knowledge Delivery Architecture for structured digital education. Zoom-integrated pedagogical workflows with secure PDF-based content distribution.

System ArchitectureKnowledge DeliveryAPI EcosystemsLaravel
Multi-Service Platform

KaamSansar — Ecosystem Modelling

Comprehensive digital ecosystem for multi-service discovery including job matching and predictive horoscope analysis. Modular architecture for secure multi-tenant environments.

Ecosystem ModellingModular FrameworksDiscovery Engines
Governance & Compliance

GRC Management System

Enterprise-grade platform incorporating Audit Management, Asset Management, and Compliance Tracking with risk assessment workflows and real-time dashboards.

Audit LifecycleRisk AssessmentReportingLaravel
ITAM & Service Mgmt

TechAsset Management System

Technology asset management solution with automated asset discovery (FQDN/IP-based), centralised inventory, and integrated ticket management for improved IT visibility.

Automated DiscoveryLifecycle TrackingService Management
Certification Tech

Certificate Management System

Automated system for issuing, tracking, and verifying professional certifications with secure verification workflows, automated PDF generation, and RBAC.

Verification APIPDF AutomationAccess Control

Academic Research & Prototypes

★ Featured

NagarGPT — LLM-Based Multilingual Voice Chatbot

A domain-adaptive AI chatbot with multilingual text-voice I/O, delivering contextual responses via an LLM + RAG pipeline. Scaled for real-world accessibility with RESTful API deployment using Ngrok.

PythonFlaskHugging FacegTTSSpeechRecognitionRAGRESTful APINgrok
Social App

MithoMitho — Food Social Platform

Food-focused social application built with Python Flask. Community engagement workflows, food discovery, and user-driven content sharing.

Python FlaskWeb DevelopmentSocial UI
Full-Stack Platform

Structured Q&A Platform

Community-based Q&A platform with voting systems, categories, and real-time updates.

Full-StackDatabase DesignUser Auth
System Software

C-Based Account Management System

Secure and efficient account management system focused on memory efficiency, file-based data persistence, and algorithmic problem-solving.

C ProgrammingFile I/OData Persistence

Professional Roles

May 2025 — Present● Current

Laravel Developer

Trilokya Technology

  • Developed an Asset Management, Audit & Compliance System.
  • Built reactive components using Laravel & Livewire with strong backend and database integration.
  • Designed and optimised MySQL databases with complex joins, indexes, and raw SQL queries.
  • Mentored juniors and interns; conducted code reviews and facilitated team collaboration.

Laravel Developer

TukiSoft Pvt. Ltd

Xdezo Technology
